outcomes.rollFlavourText: A key shipping contract was cancelled; routes are running at a loss.
Throughput is steady. Nothing gained, nothing lost.
New regional contracts signed; delivery volume is up.
Order book is full and the fleet is running at capacity.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Treat loan repayment roll as one higher on this asset.
+1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

cardDescription: Tier 1 downstream logistics asset. Generates $1 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved.
flavourText: The last mile is where the margin lives.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A production run was scrapped; cost overruns absorbed the quarter.
The floor is running on schedule. No surprises.
Efficiency gains on the line; output per shift is up.
A major fabrication contract fills the order book to the year's end.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Negative GMI delta on this asset reduced by 1 (minimum 0).
+1 additional loan interest payment counts as income offset.

cardDescription: Tier 1 midstream fabrication asset. Generates $1 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved.
flavourText: Precision is cheap. Tolerance is expensive.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Raw material costs spiked; the foundry ran at a loss this cycle.
Components shipped on time and on spec. Another unremarkable quarter.
A downstream buyer expanded their order; casting volume increased.
The foundry is running three shifts; every mould is spoken for.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan interest payment counts as an income offset this year.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each ENERGY asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: Tier 1 upstream foundry asset. Zero stress at acquisition. Generates $1 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved.
flavourText: Every empire starts at the foundry floor.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A product recall and order cancellations have stalled the production line.
Consumer demand held flat. The line kept moving.
Seasonal demand lifted; the warehouse cleared faster than projected.
A retail chain placed a record order; distribution is running at full stretch.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +2 loan interest payments count as income offsets this year.
Treat repayment roll as one higher on this asset.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MEDIA asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: Tier 2 downstream consumer goods asset. Generates $1 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A plant shutdown and overrun costs hit the balance sheet hard.
Heavy equipment kept rolling. Output matched forecast exactly.
An infrastructure contract came through; the yards are back to full shift.
Maximum throughput. Every crane, lathe, and press is spoken for.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible. Engineer CEO doubles stress reduction from integration.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: −1 stress once per year when this asset rolls 4+ on its value update. Engineer CEO doubles this stress reduction.
Value cannot fall below 9 from any single event.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 20.

cardDescription: Tier 2 midstream heavy industry asset. Generates $1 income per year with stress reduction on strong rolls when integrated. GMI impact is halved; Engineer CEO doubles integration stress benefit.
flavourText: Steel doesn't care about your feelings.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A trial failure pulled the pipeline. Funding dried up accordingly.
Research continues. No results to report. No results expected.
Promising compound data attracted a licensing inquiry from a major distributor.
A breakthrough result cleared regulatory review; the molecule has a market.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: MFG + TECH hybrid. Researcher CEO only: Trial die available. Success: +3 to all positive deltas, +1 loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue, GMI-sensitive (standard MFG halving applies). Failure: baseLoanCapacity −2, GMI-resistant. Non-Researcher players: trial die is unavailable. This asset operates permanently at pre-trial values with GMI-immune status. No trial can be triggered.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Researcher CEO only: Trial die available. Success: +3 to all positive deltas, +1 loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue, GMI-sensitive (standard MFG halving applies). Failure: baseLoanCapacity −2, GMI-resistant. Non-Researcher players: trial die is unavailable. This asset operates permanently at pre-trial values with GMI-immune status. No trial can be triggered.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 18 (post-trial success for Researcher; at any time for others).

cardDescription: Tier 2 upstream MFG+TECH hybrid. Generates no income. Researcher CEO may trigger the Trial die to unlock amplified deltas and increased loan scaling; non-Researcher players operate this asset at fixed pre-trial values with GMI immunity.
flavourText: The molecule doesn't care about your timeline.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Tolerance failures on a critical component batch triggered a costly rework cycle.
Specs met. Tolerances held. The machines did what they were built to do.
A defence-adjacent contract came through; precision parts are shipping on schedule.
A multi-year supply agreement signed; the engineering floor is booked solid.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible. Engineer CEO: integration bonuses doubled.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 to this asset's loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue. Engineer CEO: integration bonuses doubled — this becomes +2.

cardDescription: Tier 2 upstream precision manufacturing asset. Generates $1 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved; Engineer CEO doubles integration loan scaling bonuses.
flavourText: Measured in microns. Valued in millions.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Multiple divisions posted losses; a restructuring announcement cratered confidence.
Consolidated output was marginally up. The conglomerate held its position.
Several divisions hit targets; the portfolio is carrying its weight.
Record group output. Every division is at or above capacity for the year.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI halved. Depreciable — income offset eligible. The Foreman's Blessing may target this asset's owner as well as other players.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: The Foreman's Blessing may target this asset's owner as well as other players — declared before the repayment roll.
Value cannot fall below 18 from any single event.

cardDescription: Tier 3 downstream conglomerate asset. Generates $2 income per year, eligible for depreciation-based income offset. GMI impact is halved; Foreman CEO may direct The Blessing to self when fully integrated.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A failed synthesis run and a contaminated batch halted production for the quarter.
Bioreactors held steady. The process is consistent, if not spectacular.
Scale-up from lab to production succeeded; batch yields are ahead of projection.
Full commercial scale achieved. The manufacturing line is running without a single rejected batch.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: MFG + TECH hybrid. Researcher CEO: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if post-trial value exceeds 28. Non-Researcher: +1 loan cap if value exceeds 28 (static threshold; no trial). +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue after trial resolves (Researcher). Non-Researcher: activates at year 4 of ownership instead.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Researcher CEO: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if post-trial value exceeds 28. Non-Researcher: +1 loan cap if value exceeds 28 (static threshold; no trial).
+1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue after trial resolves (Researcher). Non-Researcher: activates at year 4 of ownership instead.

cardDescription: Tier 3 midstream MFG+TECH hybrid. Generates no income. Researcher CEO unlocks enhanced loan capacity scaling post-trial; non-Researcher players access equivalent bonuses through value thresholds and years of ownership.
flavourText: Biology is the new manufacturing line.
